calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, Bailiff: R. Guitron.
Petitioner: Patricia Ann Ross, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Patricia Ann Staples Ross.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Amended

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Petitioner: Christ Ann Staples present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Patricia Ann Ross.
Decree signed in open court.
